summary: This topic describes how to assign specific subjects and their corresponding teachers to the predefined lecture slots for each day of the week within a class's timetable.
steps: After defining the timetable schedule (lecture timings), navigate to the timetable view for the specific class.
Select the desired 'Day' of the week (e.g., Monday).
Click on a specific 'Lecture Slot' to assign a subject and teacher.
Select the 'Subject' from the dropdown list (only subjects mapped to the class will appear).
Select the 'Employee' (teacher) from the list (only teachers mapped to the subject or class will appear).
To define a 'Break' for a specific slot on a particular day: Click on the slot, toggle the 'Break' option to ON, and click 'Push'.
Repeat this process for all lecture slots and days of the week to complete the timetable.
business_rules: Only subjects that have been mapped to the selected class will be available for assignment.
Only employees who have been mapped as teachers for the class or specific subject will be available for selection.
The system allows for defining breaks within specific lecture slots on particular days.
important_notes: The 'Push' button is crucial for saving any assignments or changes made to a lecture slot.
The 'Remove' option is available to clear a subject/teacher assignment or a break from a slot.
The system may support assigning multiple subjects to the same time slot, but this functionality needs explicit configuration.
questions: How do I assign subjects to specific lecture slots in the timetable?
How do I assign teachers to subjects within the timetable schedule?
Can I define a break for a specific lecture slot on a particular day?
What happens if I need to change a subject or teacher in an already assigned timetable slot?
Are only mapped subjects and teachers available for selection in the timetable?
related_topics: Teacher Assignment to Classes and Subjects
